topic: Direct Speech to Speech Translation: A Review
topic_definition: Direct Speech to Speech Translation: A Review

summary_topics.description: Direct Speech to Speech Translation: A Review

required.criterion: Focuses on direct Speech-to-Speech Translation (S2ST) (i.e., S2ST is the focus of the review).
Relates to state-of-the-art work in machine learning regarding S2ST.
Covers direct S2ST techniques that avoid intermediate text representations.
Studies on application of models like Translatotron 2, UnitY, or other neural network structures (neural S2ST models).

exclusion_criteria.criterion: Cascade models regarding S2ST that concern conversion of intermediate texts (i.e., uses intermediate text representations).
Papers that present machine translation for text-only or audio-only tasks without mentioning S2ST.
